panels.title: fix: default payment gateway to dodo instead of lemonsqueezy
panels.scene: A confused lemon wearing a crown and holding a bag of money is being kicked out of the village by the knight. Villagers celebrate, throwing dodos (the bird) into the air.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The lemon is gone! Our payments are safe with the dodo now!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Just a configuration change. We're using a different service.

panels.title: fix: remove health.ts to stay within Vercel Hobby 12-function limit
panels.scene: The Knight snips a tiny, pulsating file labeled 'health.ts' with scissors. A giant Vercel server looms in the background, menacingly displaying '13/12'. The '13' is flashing red. Removing the file makes it say '11/12'. Villagers celebrate.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: He has appeased the server gods! We are under the limit again!

bubbles.speaker: Knight
bubbles.text: Removed an unused endpoint. Stayed within the function limit.

panels.title: chore: gitignore large media assets to prevent 4GB vercel uploads
panels.scene: The knight calmly adds a line to a `.gitignore` file. Behind him, a massive pile of media files (images, videos) labeled '4.1 GB' are being sucked into a black hole labeled 'Git Ignore'. Villagers gasp in awe.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: The Great Un-Upload! He contained the bloat!

panels.title: 23 commits. 7 features. 8 chores. 3 fixes. 5 docs.
panels.scene: Knight sitting exhausted, leaning against a stone wall. A villager is holding a baby, presenting it to the knight. The baby is wearing a tiny Dodo-themed hat. In the background, another villager is writing 'InAppBrowserGate' on a banner.

bubbles.speaker: Villager
bubbles.text: We named our child Dodo! And we're building a gate!
